LanguageData.SylvieRace_InitialTrauma.label: Initial Trauma
LanguageData.SylvieRace_InitialTrauma.description: A deep psychological and physical trauma from past experiences. Requires careful medical attention and time to heal.
LanguageData.SylvieRace_NurseParalysis.label: Nurse uniform paralysis
LanguageData.SylvieRace_NurseParalysis.description: A temporary paralysis caused by the nurse uniform's automatic healing process.
